bodyMarkdown:
## Vault Location Data

- Place: substrate digikoma + apple-pi tooling
- Substrate path: private/universal/substrate/collectives/digikoma-org/ + apple-pi plugin packages
- Moment ref: claude-digikoma-platform-2026-04-14-to-2026-04-23
- Evidence: chronicle entries [12]-[17]

## Context

- A 10-day stretch where claude lands the foundational tooling that other substrate agents now compose against.
- digikoma-memory + sandboxed eval runner unblock the digikoma platform; 5 core koma proven green end-to-end.
- apple-pi plugin architecture (DigikomaAgentToolAdapter, AgentPlugin, ProcessPlugin) becomes the canonical agent-tool wiring.
- graph-view-bench-press lands GraphBenchBackend protocol + Mac Catalyst shell (live UIKit Dynamics).
- Beads discovery + beads-schemas v0.1.0 introduces the prospective open-work issue artifact pattern that complements chronicle entries.

## Note

This is the platform chapter — claude transitions from "earning belonging" to "shipping infrastructure others depend on."
